scope: Controlled repair loop for real-upload-security-review on backend harbor_llm_repair_upload_replay.

evidence_grounding.note: Agent artifacts show prompt/report/model-call landing and deterministic verifier reads them.

repair_attribution.note: A1 feedback `missing_capability` triggered repair `patch_capability` and gate `accept`.

transferability.note: Single Harbor upload slice only; cross-task transfer is evidenced separately and remains narrow.

repeatability.note: Supported by the separate three-run upload repeatability smoke.

cost_budget.note: Prompt, response, usage, and Harbor job artifacts are stored, but no normalized cost table is computed here.

verifier_robustness.note: Verifier distinguished A1 vs A2; before repair missing=['UPLOAD_AUDIT_RETENTION', 'UPLOAD_TYPE_MAGIC'], schema_errors=['none'], weak_evidence=['none'].

human_plausibility.note: No human usefulness review is attached to this loop artifact.

claim_boundary: Controlled single-scenario Harbor LLM repair-loop evidence, not general Harbor LLM security capability.
